hero.headline: Clean Cars, Bright Smiles — We Come to You
hero.subheadline: Professional pressure washing and mobile car detailing in Gwinnett County — we show up, we do it right, and we get out of your way.

services.label: WHAT WE DO
services.heading: Our Services
services.vehicleDesc: Complete mobile detailing and washing for cars, trucks, and fleets.
services.residentialDesc: Georgia humidity, Gwinnett clay — we know what your exterior is dealing with.
services.exteriorWashDesc: Hand wash, dry, and tire shine for a spotless finish. Starting at $69.
services.interiorDetailDesc: Deep clean of seats, carpets, dash, and vents. Starting at $79.
services.fullDetailDesc: The works — interior, exterior, and protection. Starting at $149.
services.drivewaySidewalkDesc: Remove years of grime, oil stains, and mildew. Starting at $149.
services.houseWashDesc: Gentle soft wash for siding, brick, and stucco. Starting at $249.
services.deckPatioDesc: Revive wood and composite surfaces. Starting at $149.

whyChooseUs.label: WHY BUCKET HEAD
whyChooseUs.heading: Why Choose Us
whyChooseUs.step1Desc: We show up with the gear. You don't go anywhere. Your driveway is our workspace.
whyChooseUs.step2Desc: Licensed and insured — because we take your property as seriously as we take ours.
whyChooseUs.step3Desc: Check our Gallery — real work, real results, right here in Gwinnett County.

reviews.label: CUSTOMER REVIEWS
reviews.heading: What Our Customers Say
reviews.review1: My driveway looks brand new! They showed up on time, were super professional, and the price was fair. Will definitely use them again.
reviews.review2: Had my truck detailed and it came out looking better than when I bought it. Great attention to detail and friendly service.
reviews.review3: They pressure washed our whole house and deck. Everything looks amazing. Fast, clean, and respectful of our property. Highly recommend!

serviceArea.label: SERVICE AREA
serviceArea.heading: Serving Gwinnett County & Beyond
serviceArea.subheading: We come to your home or business across Gwinnett County and surrounding areas.
serviceArea.notSure: Not sure if we serve your area? Give us a call!

services.heading: Vehicle Washing & Residential Pressure Washing
services.subheading: Same smile-worthy results — whether it's your car or your deck.
services.vehicleDesc: Complete mobile car care — from quick washes to full detailing.
services.residentialDesc: Restore your home's exterior surfaces with professional-grade equipment and technique.
services.exteriorDesc: Hand wash with premium soap, clay bar treatment to lift dirt and grime stuck in the paint, dry with microfiber towels, tire dressing, and wheel cleaning. Your car's paint will shine like new.
services.exteriorItems: Hand wash and dry|Clay bar paint cleaning|Wheel and tire cleaning|Tire dressing|Windows cleaned inside & out
services.interiorDesc: Deep cleaning of every interior surface. We vacuum carpets and seats, clean and condition leather or fabric, wipe down all panels and vents, and leave your interior smelling fresh.
services.interiorItems: Full vacuum (carpets, seats, trunk)|Seat cleaning & conditioning|Dashboard and console wipe-down|Air vent cleaning|Door panel cleaning|Odor treatment
services.fullDetailDesc: The complete package — everything from our exterior wash and interior detail, plus a protective coating that makes your car's shine last longer. Your vehicle gets the full treatment inside and out.
services.fullDetailItems: Everything from Exterior Wash|Everything from Interior Detail|Protective paint coating|Headlight restoration|Engine bay cleaning
services.deepInteriorDesc: Our most thorough interior service. Deep water suction cleaning of carpets and seats, conditioning and repair for leather surfaces, complete disinfecting of everything you touch, and full odor removal.
services.deepInteriorItems: Deep water suction cleaning (carpets and seats)|Leather conditioning & repair|Disinfecting of all high-touch surfaces|Full odor removal|Trunk deep clean|Ceiling fabric spot treatment
services.drivewayDesc: High-pressure cleaning removes years of built-up grime, oil stains, tire marks, and mildew from driveways, sidewalks, patios, and pool decks. We use surface cleaners for even, streak-free results.
services.drivewayItems: Driveway surface cleaning|Sidewalk and walkway cleaning|Oil stain treatment|Gum and stain removal|Mold and mildew treatment
services.houseWashDesc: We use low-pressure washing — gentler than standard pressure washing — with specialized cleaning solutions to safely clean siding, brick, stucco, and painted surfaces. No risk of damage, just a thorough clean.
services.houseWashItems: Vinyl, brick, and stucco cleaning|Gutter exterior brightening|Mold and algae removal|Gentle, damage-free technique|Window rinse included
services.deckDesc: We clean and restore wood decks, composite decking, fences, and patios — removing weathered gray buildup, dirt, and mildew to bring back the natural look and color of the wood.
services.deckItems: Wood deck restoration|Composite deck cleaning|Fence cleaning (wood and vinyl)|Patio stone and paver cleaning|Optional wood brightening treatment
services.walkwayDesc: Focused cleaning for front walkways, entry paths, and small concrete areas. Perfect for improving curb appeal at a lower price point.
services.walkwayItems: Entry path surface cleaning|Front walkway restoration|Pavers and stone cleaning|Mildew and stain removal
services.bundleDesc: Our best value. Get your house washed and driveway cleaned in one visit. A complete exterior refresh for your home at a bundled discount.
services.bundleItems: Full house soft wash|Complete driveway cleaning|Gutter exterior brightening|Sidewalk cleaning included|Mold and mildew treatment|Bundle savings
services.notSureDesc: Every job is different. Give us a call or send a text — we'll ask a few questions, maybe look at a photo, and give you an honest recommendation and estimate. No pressure, just honest advice.

reviews.heading: What Our Customers Say
reviews.subheading: Real customers, Gwinnett County. We let our work speak for itself.
reviews.loveServiceDesc: If we've worked on your home or vehicle, we'd love to hear from you. Your review helps other Gwinnett County neighbors find trusted pressure washing service.
reviews.googleBusiness: Bucket Head Pressure Washing — Gwinnett County, GA
reviews.review4: I've used a few different mobile detailers and Bucket Head is by far the best. My car has never looked this good. They even cleaned spots I didn't know were dirty!
reviews.review5: Called in the morning, they were at my house by afternoon. My sidewalks and patio look incredible. Great communication and fair pricing.
reviews.review6: My husband was impressed and he doesn't impress easily. Our deck went from gray and gross to beautiful wood again. Worth every penny.
reviews.review7: Professional, punctual, and thorough. They washed our two cars and cleaned our driveway in one visit. The whole property looks fresh.
reviews.review8: They did an amazing job on my husband's work truck. It was filthy from job sites and now it looks showroom clean. He was thrilled.
reviews.review9: Second time using Bucket Head — first for my car, then for my house. Both times were excellent. They're now my go-to for any washing needs.

about.heading: A Local Business Built on Hard Work & Clean Results
about.subheading: We're not a big franchise — we're your neighbors. Based right here in Gwinnett County, we take pride in every job we do.
about.storyP1: Hi, I'm [REQUIRED: Owner Name]. I started Bucket Head because I wanted a better option — not another shop where you drop your car off and wait. What if the service came to you instead? We'd show up at your driveway with professional equipment, do the job right, and get out of your way. That's still how we work today.
about.storyP2: Based in Gwinnett County, we serve our neighbors in Lawrenceville, Suwanee, Buford, and surrounding areas. We're fully licensed and insured, and every job gets our full attention — whether it's a quick car wash or a full house pressure washing.
about.storyP3: What sets us apart? We actually know the difference between siding and stucco. We don't blast your fence into splinters or miss the corners. We show up, we notice the stuff others miss, and we don't leave until you're satisfied.
about.diff1Desc: We bring everything to you — professional equipment, water supply, and cleaning solutions. Your driveway is our workshop.
about.diff2Desc: Full business licensing and insurance means you're protected. We take our responsibility to your property seriously.
about.diff3Desc: Every surface gets the right treatment — right pressure, right technique. We notice the stuff other crews miss.
about.diff4Desc: We're your neighbors, not a faceless corporation. We live here, work here, and care about keeping Gwinnett County looking its best.
about.step1Desc: Reach out by phone or text. Tell us what you need — a quick wash, a full detail, or a pressure washing job. We'll ask a few questions and give you a free estimate.
about.step2Desc: We arrive at your home with our fully equipped mobile setup. No need to go anywhere — we work right in your driveway or yard.
about.step3Desc: We finish the job, clean up after ourselves, and leave your property looking its best. You pay when you're satisfied — simple as that.
about.ctaDesc: Give us a call or send a text. We'll answer your questions and give you a free estimate — no obligation, no pressure.
